info.name: Ronald Rivero
info.title: Full Stack & Cloud Developer (AWS) | DevSecOps, Compliance as Code & Agentic AI Specialist | STEM Educator & Mentor

about.title: About me
about.description: I am a Full Stack and DevSecOps Developer (AWS Certified Developer). My greatest differentiator lies in combining robust technical execution in the cloud with over 15 years of strategic experience in Quality Management Systems (QMS). I specialize in designing secure, scalable infrastructures under the *Compliance as Code* paradigm, orchestrating large-scale data architectures, and integrating Artificial Intelligence into critical corporate workflows. Alongside my technical role, I serve as a STEM educator and mentor; throughout my career, I have trained over 5,000 students in programs like Ceibal and Jóvenes a Programar, driving the technological inclusion of new generations and fostering teams with an ethical, positive-impact vision.
